nasb.text: Now to Him who is able to establish you according to my gospel and the preaching of Jesus Christ, according to the revelation of the mystery which has been kept secret for long ages past,

esv.text: Now to him who is able to strengthen you according to my gospel and the preaching of Jesus Christ, according to the revelation of the mystery that was kept secret for long ages

cnv.text: 神能依照我所傳的福音和耶穌基督所傳的信息，照著他奧祕的啟示，堅定你們。這奧祕自古以來祕而不宣，

ccb.text: 感谢上帝！祂能使你们刚强，正如我所传讲的福音和耶稣基督的教导。这福音是自古隐藏、从未显明的奥秘，

csbs.text: 愿荣耀归于神——他能藉着我的福音和有关耶稣基督的传道，藉着奥秘的启示坚固你们。这奥秘亘古以来是隐藏的，
